name.zh: 中国气象数据网（国家气象信息中心）

description.en: The China Meteorological Data Service Center (CMDC), operated by the National Meteorological Information Center under the China Meteorological Administration (CMA), is the official national platform for sharing and accessing meteorological scientific data in China. It provides open access to historical weather observations, climate datasets, atmospheric sounding records, precipitation data, temperature records, and specialized meteorological products covering thousands of weather stations across China dating back decades. The platform supports scientific research, disaster prevention, and climate change studies.
description.zh: 中国气象数据网（CMDC）由中国气象局国家气象信息中心运营，是中国官方气象科学数据共享与访问平台。提供气象历史观测数据、气候数据集、大气探测记录、降水数据、温度记录及专项气象产品的开放获取，覆盖全国数千个气象站数十年数据，支持科学研究、防灾减灾及气候变化研究。

en: solar radiation and sunshine duration data
zh: 地面气象历史观测数据
高空探测与无线电探空数据
太阳辐射和日照时数数据
